hooks.command: python3 -c "import json,os,sys; f=json.loads(os.environ.get('CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT','{}')).get('file_path',''); print('Blocked: manage uv.lock and .python-version via uv, not directly') or sys.exit(2) if any(f.endswith(x) for x in ['uv.lock','.python-version']) else None"

python3 -c "import json,os,subprocess,sys; inp=json.loads(os.environ.get('CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT','{}')); f=inp.get('file_path',''); r=subprocess.run(['uv','run','pyright',f],capture_output=True,text=True,cwd=os.environ.get('CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR','.')) if f.endswith('.py') else None; print(r.stdout) if r and r.returncode!=0 else None; sys.exit(2) if r and r.returncode!=0 else None"
